True only for commit statuses that prove fact-log durability.

## Import

```ts
import { agenticMemoryFactCommitStatusIsDurable } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions";
```

## Signature

```ts
function agenticMemoryFactCommitStatusIsDurable(status: AgenticMemoryFactCommitStatus): boolean
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `status` | `AgenticMemoryFactCommitStatus` | Commit result status. |

## Returns

Whether the fact batch is known durable or idempotently already durable.
